info.title: EliteApply API
info.description: Platform API for the student application operating system.

get.description:
Deep readiness check: probes the DB, auth IdP, and SQS concurrently.

Returns 200 only when every critical dependency is reachable; otherwise 503 so
orchestrators/load balancers stop routing traffic to this instance.

post.summary: Confirm email address with the verification code
Authenticate and receive browser-memory JWT tokens
Set a password for basic email/password login from an OAuth account

get.summary: Check if the authenticated user has a native email/password credential

post.summary: Refresh browser-memory access and ID tokens using the HttpOnly session cookie
Request a password reset code via email
Change password for an authenticated user

delete.summary: Permanently delete user account (requires email verification code)

get.summary: Export all of the user's personal data as a JSON download (GDPR Art. 20)

post.summary: Record acceptance of the current Terms/Privacy version and marketing preference
Request account deletion — sends a one-time confirmation code by email

put.summary: Upload a file to local storage via a signed token

get.summary: Download a file from local storage via a signed token

code.title: Code
code.description: One-time deletion confirmation code sent by email
